quests.name: Genin Graduation
quests.desc: Graduate the Academy and form Team 7.

quests.name: The Bell Test
quests.desc: Pass Kakashi's teamwork trial at the Training Grounds.

quests.name: Land of Waves
quests.desc: Cross the Great Naruto Bridge and stop Zabuza and Haku.

quests.name: The Chunin Exams
quests.desc: Survive the Forest of Death, then win the Stadium tournament.

quests.name: Breaking of Bonds
quests.desc: Confront Sasuke at the village gates.

quests.name: Mount Myoboku
quests.desc: Train with the toads and awaken Sage Mode.

quests.name: The Akatsuki Shadow
quests.desc: Drive off the Akatsuki hunters on the road.

quests.name: Valley of the End
quests.desc: Bring Sasuke home — whatever it takes.
